name: Pumpkin Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Pumpkin dishes don't have to be sweet. This one is perfect with roast pork.
Hollow out a small pumpkin for serving in for a special presentation.
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Using a paring knife, peel and discard the outer skin of the pumpkin.
3. Slice the pumpkin into 1/4-inch slices and place in a mixing bowl.
4. Add the chopped onion, salt, pepper, and melted butter to the bowl.
5. Toss well to combine all ingredients.
6. Pour the contents of the bowl into a greased 9-inch round or square baking dish.
7. Cover with foil and place in the oven.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, beat eggs, milk, and cheese together until smooth.
10. Remove the baking dish from the oven and pour the cheese mixture over the top of the pumpkin slices.
11. Replace the cover and return to the oven.
12. Bake uncovered for another 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
